name: Buying-Unit Penetration
description: Know whether your team is covering the full buying committee at each target account, or single-threaded and quietly at risk.
alsoSurfaces: Which target accounts are dangerously single-threaded?
Where are we engaged with users but missing economic buyers?
Where have we never reached technical evaluators?
Which roles have the lowest coverage across our target list?
beforeWeRun: Buying-unit definition: by personas, by titles, or 6sense buying-stages?
Account scope: all target accounts, or top tier only?
Coverage threshold: at least N personas engaged in last M days?

whatYoullGet.name: Penetration KPIs
whatYoullGet.desc: Avg personas engaged per account, accounts at risk, accounts fully covered.

whatYoullGet.name: Coverage matrix
whatYoullGet.desc: Heatmap of personas × accounts; gaps clearly visible.

whatYoullGet.name: Risk list
whatYoullGet.desc: Single-threaded accounts ranked by deal size.

whatYoullGet.name: Drill-down
whatYoullGet.desc: Click any account to see who's engaged and who's missing.

callout: 4 quick inputs, then Sage builds your penetration dashboard in ~9 min.
